title: thelypteris mapiriensis
intro: Thelypteris mapiriensis, also known as Mapiri fern or Mapiri polypody, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris mapiriensis include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including coughs, colds, and skin irritations.
